## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this change needed?

## Scope

- Area touched:
- User-facing impact:
- Risk level:

## Testing

- [ ] `cd backend && ./.venv/bin/pytest`
- [ ] I tested the main happy path locally
- [ ] I updated or added tests when behavior changed

## Coordination Notes

- Shared contracts changed:
- New environment variables:
- Follow-up work needed:

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `feature/...`, `fix/...`, or `chore/...`
- [ ] I did not push directly to `main`
- [ ] I requested at least one teammate review for shared or high-risk changes
- [ ] I updated docs such as `AGENTS.md`, `.env.example`, or `CONTRIBUTING.md` when needed
